betterquesting:10.desc:8:
§6PUREX Reprocessing Plant§f

§aRecover valuable isotopes from spent nuclear fuel — plutonium, technetium, and schrabidium!§f

The §bPUREX§f (Plutonium Uranium Reduction EXtraction) is a 5×5×5 pseudo-multiblock that reprocesses depleted nuclear fuel into various materials. Most recipes require both §bNitric Acid§f and §bKerosene§f.

§6Construction§f (Assembly Machine — 15s, 100 HE/t):
§b• 4×§f Steel Shell
§b• 8×§f Rubber Pipe
§b• 4×§f Cast Lead Plate
§b• 4×§f Desh Motor
§b• 4×§f Integrated Circuit Board

§6PUREX can reprocess§f:
§b• Depleted ZIRNOX, PWR, Watz§f and §bPlate Fuel§f
§b• Depleted Liquid Thorium Salt§f
§b• Depleted ICF Fuel Pellets§f
§b• Vitrify Nuclear Waste§f
§b• Extract Schrabidium§f from schraranium, ZIRNOX Pu fuel, and PWR MEP/MEN fuel (requires Schrabidic Acid, yields §e2×§f the schrabidium used to make the acid)

§6GUI§f: Visually similar to the Chemical Plant and Assembly Machine. Template button in bottom left corner. Features §e3 input slots§f + §e3 input fluid slots§f, §e6 output slots§f + §e1 output fluid slot§f, and a §e1.0 MHE§f buffer.

§6Auto Switch Groups§f: 5 recipe groups that auto-switch based on input ingredient:
§b• ZIRNOX Fuel§f reprocessing
§b• Plate Fuel§f reprocessing
§b• PWR Fuel§f reprocessing
§b• Watz Pellet§f reprocessing
§b• Schrabidium Extraction§f
